response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C++ (including early C experience) and multiple languages, but his primary expertise lies in web/mobile development, scripting, and newer paradigms rather than capital markets or fixed-income systems. His domain experience is more aligned with general IT or geospatial applications, and there is no clear evidence of fixed-income, investment banking, or capital markets domain exposure in his resume. While he meets some technical requirements (C++, SQL, Windows), the lack of financial domain experience and the absence of key optional skills (e.g., Summit, Kafka, CI/CD for financial systems) significantly reduce his overall fit.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (early and professional career)
Proven SQL proficiency (SQL Server, MySQL, MongoDB)
Demonstrated ability to work on complex systems (low-latency, real-time, high-throughput applications)
concerns: No explicit fixed-income, investment banking, or capital markets domain experience
Primary expertise in web/mobile/embedded systems rather than financial systems
Lacks optional skills highly relevant to the role (e.g., Summit platform, Kafka, CI/CD for financial systems)
